diff: The consolidation of funds from Legacy Accounts into the Core Council Buffer or the Demand Side Buffer (see [A.2.2.8.1.2.1.4 - Demand Side Buffer](862b6d83-f464-4125-8259-233b7de75ec4)) is recognized as a one-time expense for purposes of [A.2.3.1.2.1 - Step 0: Net Revenue](c09435ff-d876-442a-899c-ad494175500b). This achieves the same result as if the funds in Legacy Accounts had been returned to the Sky Surplus Buffer and subsequently transferred to the relevant downstream account.

The consolidation of funds from Legacy Accounts into the Core Council Buffer or the Demand Side Buffer (see [A.2.2.8.1.2.1.4 - Demand Side Buffer](862b6d83-f464-4125-8259-233b7de75ec4)) is recognized as a one-time expense for purposes of [A.2.3.1.2.1 - Step 0: Net Revenue](c09435ff-d876-442a-899c-ad494175500b). This achieves the same result as if the funds in Legacy Accounts had been returned to the Sky Surplus Buffer and subsequently transferred to the relevant downstream account.
